build-railway-between-two-cities-descrip: There's been an increase in goods exchange from {{fromStation}} to {{toStation}}, building a railway between both those cities and creating a freight line may be very fruitful!
tutorial-direct-railway-title: Tutorial #1 - Building a railroad line between two cities
tutorial-direct-railway-description:
Welcome to Logistik!

In this game, you run a railroad company. Your goal is to grow your business by building railroad tracks and connecting stations with trains.

To get started, I’d like you to build a line between {{fromStation}} and {{toStation}}. To do this, use the "Railway" tool in the toolbar on the left (or the R key on your keyboard), then click on the two stations.
tutorial-planned-rolling-stock-descripti:
Now that {{fromStation}} and {{toStation}} are connected by a railroad line, it's time to run a train!

To do this, open the train scheduler in the left toolbar (or press the P key on your keyboard). Once the interface is open, click {{fromStation}} and then {{toStation}}. Finally, click the "Create" button.
